mapper.select:
SELECT ID,UNIT_ID,UNIT_NAME,RATE_ID, INVOICE_ID, STATEMENT_NO, INVOICE_TYPE, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, NUMBER_COUNT, AMOUNT, TAX, PIECE_AMOUNT,TAX_AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL( ID, INVOICE_ID, STATEMENT_NO, INVOICE_TYPE, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, NUMBER_COUNT, PIECE_AMOUNT, AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, RATE_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{numberCount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pieceAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_ID = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATEMENT_NO = #{statementNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATEMENT_DETAIL_ID = #{statementDetailId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_TYPE = #{invoiceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ITEM_CODE = #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ITEM_NAME = #{rateItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NUMBER_COUNT = #{numberCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, PIECE_AMOUNT = #{pieceAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AMOUNT = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX = #{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ID =#{rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, INVOICE_ID, STATEMENT_NO, STATEMENT_DETAIL_ID, "TYPE", RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, NUMBER_COUNT, AMOUNT, PIECE_AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, RATE_ID FROM T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL WHERE ID
#{item.id}
SELECT PRODUCT_CODE "productCode" FROM M_FEE_ITEM mfi WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
